data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the feature for photo annotation, specifically markups, arrows, and text on images. While the linked use case mentions that the site supervisor annotates photos with measurements and marks safety concerns with arrows, there is no explicit evidence that confirms the full requirement of photo annotation as stated. The evidence does not detail the specific capabilities of the annotation feature, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of explicit evidence confirming the full capabilities of photo annotation (markups, arrows, text on images).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
